# Acknowledgments

This project builds on excellent open source work:

## Core Infrastructure

- [K3s](https://k3s.io) — lightweight Kubernetes
- [Tailscale](https://tailscale.com) — zero-config mesh VPN
- [Ansible](https://ansible.com) — IT automation

## Container Images

- [PostgreSQL](https://postgresql.org) — the world's most advanced open source database
- [MySQL](https://mysql.com) — open source relational database
- [Grafana](https://grafana.com) — observability platform
- [Loki](https://grafana.com/oss/loki/) — log aggregation
- [Tempo](https://grafana.com/oss/tempo/) — distributed tracing
- [Pyroscope](https://grafana.com/oss/pyroscope/) — continuous profiling
- [VictoriaMetrics](https://victoriametrics.com) — metrics storage
- [Grafana Alloy](https://grafana.com/oss/alloy/) — telemetry collector

## CI/CD

- [docker/build-push-action](https://github.com/docker/build-push-action)
- [peter-evans/dockerhub-description](https://github.com/peter-evans/dockerhub-description)
- [docker/metadata-action](https://github.com/docker/metadata-action)

## Standards

- [GitHub Special Files and Paths](https://github.com/joelparkerhenderson/github-special-files-and-paths) — community health file reference
